listing.title: Node D2 - Fitzwilliam Square, 25 Pembroke Street Upper, Dublin 2
listing.seoTitle: Node D2 - Fitzwilliam Square, 25 Pembroke Street Upper, Dublin 2

prs.location: Centrally located in Dublin 2, it is walking distance to St.Stephen's Green, the restaurants and bars of Baggot Street, Camden Street and Silicon Docks, home to Ireland's burgeoning tech community.
prs.aboutDevelopment: Node Living has been leading the way in the studio living revolution, not only in Ireland, but also across the globe with hubs in Europe and America. Our mission is to establish a worldwide network of design-focused, community-driven, curated residences where our residents can connect and collaborate locally and globally.

listing.seoTitle: Mayor Square, Mayor Street Lower, IFSC, Dublin 1, Dublin 1

prs.aboutDevelopment: StudentHouse connects students with quality accommodation in Dublin, offering both free property alerts and tailored support services to simplify the rental process. Whether you're a student searching for housing, an agent managing placements, or an educational institution seeking housing solutions, we can assist. Get in touch to learn more about how we can help.

listing.title: Stoneybatter Place, Rope Walk, 20 Stoneybatter, Dublin 7, D07 NP2K, Dublin 7
listing.seoTitle: Stoneybatter Place, Rope Walk, 20 Stoneybatter, Dublin 7, D07 NP2K, Dublin 7

prs.location: Stoneybatter Place is situated in Dublin 7, a lively and well-connected area known for its independent cafés, shops, and cultural spots. TU Dublin Grangegorman is just a short walk away, with Trinity College, RCSI, and other central institutions easily accessible by bike or public transport. The residence is also close to Heuston Station, the LUAS, and several bus routes, making it an ideal base for getting around the city.
